title: Department Manager Vacancy at La Opala - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at La Opala - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at La Opala are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Indore. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About La Opala:
La Opala is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with La Opala!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
